name: Maki Zenin
description:
[Zenin Disgrace]

The Zenin Clan Massacre.

Notes: Doing Maki because I felt like it, and honestly don’t think I’ve done enough Female characters (if any). She’s also goated. This bot I started then honestly slept on for a while, not being motivated to do it. But I got there in the end, and I can just hope it’s good enough. I’m still getting used to Lorebooks, and while I know how to use them, I may not be the best at doing so.

Scenario 1: Zenin POV, Zenin Clan Massacre.

Scenario 2: Unspecified POV / {{user}} not mentioned, Zenin Clan Massacre.
